name: Klipfish (Klipfisk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the salted dried cod into pieces and soak for 24 hours in lukewarm water or milk with a teaspoon of soda.
2. Remove the fish from the soaking liquid, cut off the fins, and scrape the skin.
3. Place the fish over cold water without salt on the stove and cook for half an hour until it is tender.
4. Serve on a hot platter garnished with parsley and boiled potatoes. Melt butter and add mustard sauce. Include diced hard-boiled eggs (one egg per person).
Note: Klipfish, or salted dried cod, originated in Denmark and is highly valued in Spain as "bacalao."
